mapper.sql: id, order_fno, rorder_no, agent_No, user_no, model_no, quantity, stock_code, order_user, order_date, status, opt_code, dn_no, exp_user, export_date, finish_date, cancel_date, cancel_user, print_times, address_no, stock_customer_no, dlv_type1, dlv_type2, spec_dlvdate, pack_type, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._cs_agent_exp_data
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._cs_agent_exp_data (id, order_fno, rorder_no, agent_No, user_no, model_no, quantity, stock_code, order_user, order_date, status, opt_code, dn_no, exp_user, export_date, finish_date, cancel_date, cancel_user, print_times, address_no, stock_customer_no, dlv_type1, dlv_type2, spec_dlvdate, pack_type, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{optCode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{dnNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exportDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{cancelDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{cancelUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{printTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvType1,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dlvType2,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{specDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{packType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo._cs_agent_exp_data
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_fno = #{record.orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
agent_No = #{record.agentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_user = #{record.orderUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_date = #{record.orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
opt_code = #{record.optCode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
dn_no = #{record.dnNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_user = #{record.expUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
export_date = #{record.exportDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_date = #{record.finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cancel_date = #{record.cancelDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cancel_user = #{record.cancelUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
print_times = #{record.printTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_customer_no = #{record.stockCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_type1 = #{record.dlvType1,jdbcType=CHAR},
dlv_type2 = #{record.dlvType2,jdbcType=CHAR},
spec_dlvdate = #{record.specDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pack_type = #{record.packType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._cs_agent_exp_data set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_fno = #{record.orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, agent_No = #{record.agentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_user = #{record.orderUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_date = #{record.orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, opt_code = #{record.optCode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, dn_no = #{record.dnNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_user = #{record.expUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, export_date = #{record.exportDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish_date = #{record.finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cancel_date = #{record.cancelDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cancel_user = #{record.cancelUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, print_times = #{record.printTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stock_customer_no = #{record.stockCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dlv_type1 = #{record.dlvType1,jdbcType=CHAR}, dlv_type2 = #{record.dlvType2,jdbcType=CHAR}, spec_dlvdate = #{record.specDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pack_type = #{record.packType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo._cs_agent_exp_data
order_fno = #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
agent_No = #{agentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stock_code = #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_user = #{orderUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_date = #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
opt_code = #{optCode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
dn_no = #{dnNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_user = #{expUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
export_date = #{exportDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_date = #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cancel_date = #{cancelDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cancel_user = #{cancelUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
print_times = #{printTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
address_no = #{addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_customer_no = #{stockCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_type1 = #{dlvType1,jdbcType=CHAR},
dlv_type2 = #{dlvType2,jdbcType=CHAR},
spec_dlvdate = #{specDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pack_type = #{packType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo._cs_agent_exp_data set order_fno = #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, agent_No = #{agentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stock_code = #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_user = #{orderUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_date = #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, opt_code = #{optCode,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, dn_no = #{dnNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_user = #{expUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, export_date = #{exportDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finish_date = #{finishDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cancel_date = #{cancelDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cancel_user = #{cancelUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, print_times = #{printTimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, address_no = #{addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stock_customer_no = #{stockCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dlv_type1 = #{dlvType1,jdbcType=CHAR}, dlv_type2 = #{dlvType2,jdbcType=CHAR}, spec_dlvdate = #{specDlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pack_type = #{packType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
